α : Type u_1

x : α
t : RBNode α
hp : All p t
⊢ (match t, none with
      | nil, ub => ub
      | node c a y b, ub =>
        match cut y with
        | Ordering.lt =>
          match a, some y with
          | nil, ub => ub
          | node c a y b, ub =>
            match cut y with
            | Ordering.lt => Batteries.RBNode.upperBound? cut a (some y)
            | Ordering.gt => Batteries.RBNode.upperBound? cut b ub
            | Ordering.eq => some y
        | Ordering.gt =>
          match b, ub with
          | nil, ub => ub
          | node c a y b, ub =>
            match cut y with
            | Ordering.lt => Batteries.RBNode.upperBound? cut a (some y)
            | Ordering.gt => Batteries.RBNode.upperBound? cut b ub
            | Ordering.eq => some y
        | Ordering.eq => some y) =
      some x →
    p x

            match cut y with

            | Ordering.gt => x.snd.fst.fst ub
            | Ordering.eq => some y)
          f) =
      some x →
